overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The journey begins along a waterfront promenade under elevated highways, ascends a staircase past large digital billboards, and continues along an industrial street with overhead pipelines and neon-lit buildings.

events.description: moving from open waterfront to covered plaza area with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade under massive elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor cafe table under green umbrella

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the scene
tall futuristic building with illuminated geometric patterns and advertisements
body of water reflecting city lights along the promenade edge
green patio umbrella with white plastic chairs underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront promenade at dusk, with a massive elevated highway structure overhead. The camera moves forward along a concrete walkway beside a canal, passing outdoor cafe seating with green umbrellas. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the distance against an orange-purple sky.

events.description: beginning ascent of wide concrete staircase flanked by building walls
reaching top of stairs, transitioning to upper street level with industrial structures

agents.ego_description: walking up illuminated concrete stairs between tall building walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with embedded lighting along the edges
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on building wall
large metal pipe structure with yellow support gantries spanning overhead

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by building walls, passing a large illuminated billboard on the left. A pedestrian in yellow descends the stairs in the opposite direction. At the top, the scene opens to reveal industrial pipeline structures overhead against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street with overhead pipeline infrastructure

events.description: vehicle with headlights on drives past on the adjacent road
continuing straight along sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to road beneath massive industrial pipeline structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on sidewalk wearing dark clothing with glowing accents
dark sedan driving along the road with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: asphalt road with lane markings and moving traffic
tall concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an industrial city street at dusk, with massive pipeline structures running overhead. The sidewalk runs parallel to a road with sparse traffic, bordered by a concrete barrier wall. Neon advertisements glow in the distance as the character follows another pedestrian down the street, passing vehicles with headlights cutting through the twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a serene waterfront promenade into the heart of a dense, industrial cyberpunk district at dusk. It begins by moving along a concrete walkway beside a canal, passing green cafe umbrellas under the shadow of a massive elevated highway while neon skyscrapers glow against an orange-purple sky. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, it passes a large illuminated billboard and a descending pedestrian before the view opens up to reveal a network of overhead pipelines. The scene then shifts into an industrial city street, where the camera follows another pedestrian along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete barrier. Finally, the movement continues past vehicles with piercing headlights and glowing neon advertisements that cut through the deepening twilight.
